videos.title: Tour of Battenkill 2013
videos.description: A video showing some of the Tour of the Battenkill Bike Race on April 13, 2013.  The video was taken a the Eagleville covered bridge.  Video by Tom McMorris, McMorris Photo.  To see more videos and pictures go to www.mcmorrisphoto.com click on NEWs and the name of the event.

videos.title: [Battenkill Gran Fondo 2013-GoPro Hero 2]
videos.description:
Battenkill Gran Fondo 2013. Asked my Dad to grab some footage of his bike group as they rode in New York state. Here is the result. Quick edit.

Cambridge, New York
April 14th, 2013

Song: Buzzin by Overwerk

videos.title: Tour of the Battenkill 2013
videos.description: The 9th annual Tour of the Battenkill culminated in Sunday's "gran fondo," which featured a mob of cyclists beginning the 65-mile course in a mass start.
